title: Hadoop MapReduce Mapper Implementations
description: The 'lib/map' directory houses custom Hadoop Mapper implementations. InverseMapper swaps input keys and values. MultithreadedMapper enhances throughput via multithreading. TokenCounterMapper tokenizes text, emitting each word with a count. WrappedMapper allows custom Mapper.Context implementations, showcasing Hadoop's Mapper flexibility for diverse data processing tasks within MapReduce framework.
